arts.ttl: “I put it aside” – Sunderland man not thinking about future, focused on helping club this season
arts.sum: Last summer, Sunderland allowed Pierre Ekwah to join AS Saint-Étienne on a season-long loan deal. The midfielder joined the Black Cats from West Ham United in January 2023 and was a regular until the end of the last campaign.
